g.text: System Call Dispatch Table (Global Offset Table / .data section)

ol.li: User Mode: Load syscall ID into EAX, Args into EBX/ECX/EDX. Execute int $0x80.
CPU Action: Switches to Kernel Stack, pushes SS, ESP, EFLAGS, CS, EIP.
ASM Entry: Pushes all registers (pusha) creating struct pt_regs on stack.
Dispatch: Checks EAX bounds, calls syscall_table[EAX].
Handler: Runs C logic, returns integer value.
Return: Dispatcher saves return value into the EAX slot on the stack.
Exit: popa restores registers (with new EAX), iret returns to user EIP.

text.tspan: sys_write(int fd, char* buf, int count)
